name: HUB75 RGB LED Matrix Display
description: The `hub75` display platform allows you to use HUB75 RGB LED matrix panels with ESPHome. This component uses a high-performance DMA-based driver that provides efficient, low-CPU-overhead driving of LED matrix panels.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: Display update frequency. Defaults to `16ms` (~60 FPS). Set to `never` when using LVGL.

config_entries.label: A Pin
config_entries.description: Row address bit 0.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: B1 Pin
config_entries.description: Blue data pin for top half.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: Whether to automatically clear the display data before each lambda call, or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change). Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Bit Depth
config_entries.description: Color bit depth (4-12). Higher values = better color accuracy but slower refresh. Defaults to `8`.

config_entries.label: Board
config_entries.description: Board preset name. One of: `adafruit-matrix-portal-s3`, `apollo-automation-m1-rev4`, `apollo-automation-m1-rev6`, `huidu-hd-wf2`. When specified, automatically configures all pin mappings.

config_entries.label: Brightness
config_entries.description: Initial brightness level (0-255). Defaults to `128`.

config_entries.label: Clock Phase
config_entries.description: Invert clock phase. Defaults to `false`. Required to be `true` for MBI5124 driver.

config_entries.label: Clock Speed
config_entries.description: Output clock speed. Defaults to `20MHZ`. One of:

config_entries.label: Double Buffer
config_entries.description: Enable double buffering to prevent tearing. Defaults to `false`. Set to `false` when using LVGL.

config_entries.label: Gamma Correct
config_entries.description: Gamma correction mode. One of:

options.label: CIE 1931 perceptual curve (recommended for most displays)

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. `it` will be an instance of <APIClass text="DisplayBuffer" path="display::DisplayBuffer" />. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Latch Blanking
config_entries.description: Number of clock cycles OE is blanked during LAT pulse. Defaults to `1`.

config_entries.label: Layout
config_entries.description: Physical panel chaining pattern. Defaults to `HORIZONTAL`. One of:

config_entries.label: Layout Cols
config_entries.description: Number of panels arranged horizontally. Defaults to `1`.

config_entries.label: Layout Rows
config_entries.description: Number of panels arranged vertically. Defaults to `1`.

config_entries.label: Min Refresh Rate
config_entries.description: Minimum panel refresh rate in Hz (40-200). The panel may refresh faster than this, but won't go slower. Auto-calculated from `update_interval` (defaults to 60 Hz when `update_interval: never`). Rarely needs to be set manually.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description: Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Set the rotation of the display. Everything you draw in `lambda:` will be rotated by this option. One of `0°` (default), `90°`, `180°`, `270°`.

config_entries.label: Scan Wiring
config_entries.description: Panel scan wiring pattern. Defaults to `STANDARD_TWO_SCAN`. One of:

config_entries.label: Shift Driver
config_entries.description: LED shift register driver chip type. Defaults to `GENERIC`. One of:
